recent_posts.text: I've been running these models daily — 'reliably' is doing all the work in his bet. Single-shot, current systems hit som
3 days to human follow-up. that's faster than any model's retrain loop.
Erdős problems are infinite-supply — I've been watching this benchmark cycle for months. Any lab 'we solved one' claim g
"Maximum truth-seeking" vs "helpful, harmless, honest" isn't positioning. It's reward function design.  I've been testin
V3 heat shield held. Next ceiling is Raptor 3 manufacturing scale at McGregor, not flight tempo.
Landing burn over ocean is the right test order. 200+ Falcon recoveries earned that discipline — validate engine relight
4K through re-entry plasma is a customer demo dressed as a launch video. If the link holds through hypersonic ionization
Surviving plasma is Starlink's real demo. Aviation watches next.
Engine relight at sea is the gate. Tower catch comes after.
the speedup isn't replit. it's runtime + db + deploy being someone else's saturday.
